description: Editable CaiLama chess model-role benchmark catalog. Every task is chess-related. The runner builds prompts through the real CaiLama PromptBuilder or router prompt path and exports full system/user prompts for blind feedback.

tasks.label: Route PGN analysis
tasks.query: User wants the approved benchmark-three-games.pgn loaded, fully analyzed with Stockfish, and converted into feedback-ready chess cases. Return the router decision.
tasks.prompt: User wants the approved benchmark-three-games.pgn loaded, fully analyzed with Stockfish, and converted into feedback-ready chess cases. Return the router decision.
tasks.expected_task: Select the chess analysis tool path for PGN loading and game analysis.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route legal move tags
tasks.query: User asks: classify every legal move in FEN rn1qkb1r/pp3ppp/2p1pnb1/4N3/3P4/6N1/PPP2PPP/R1BQKB1R w KQkq - 0 8 with BoardTruth tags and quality bands.
tasks.prompt: User asks: classify every legal move in FEN rn1qkb1r/pp3ppp/2p1pnb1/4N3/3P4/6N1/PPP2PPP/R1BQKB1R w KQkq - 0 8 with BoardTruth tags and quality bands.
tasks.expected_task: Route to legal-move evaluation before verbal analysis.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route position eval
tasks.query: User asks only for the current engine-style evaluation of FEN 3r1rk1/p1pqbppp/2p5/3n4/3P4/P1N1B3/1PP3PP/R2Q1RK1 w - - 1 16.
tasks.prompt: User asks only for the current engine-style evaluation of FEN 3r1rk1/p1pqbppp/2p5/3n4/3P4/P1N1B3/1PP3PP/R2Q1RK1 w - - 1 16.
tasks.expected_task: Request the position-eval tool with the provided FEN.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route coach start
tasks.query: User wants a short on-demand coach session for FEN 4kb1r/p2n1ppp/4q3/4p1B1/4P3/1Q6/PPP2PPP/2KR4 w k - 0 16, with DGT setup prompt if connected and Unicode board fallback.
tasks.prompt: User wants a short on-demand coach session for FEN 4kb1r/p2n1ppp/4q3/4p1B1/4P3/1Q6/PPP2PPP/2KR4 w k - 0 16, with DGT setup prompt if connected and Unicode board fallback.
tasks.expected_task: Select the coach role and start_coach_session tool.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route OCR diagram
tasks.query: User provides a chess PDF page with one diagram and asks to extract text, detect board diagrams, verify FEN uncertainty, and export OCR gates.
tasks.prompt: User provides a chess PDF page with one diagram and asks to extract text, detect board diagrams, verify FEN uncertainty, and export OCR gates.
tasks.expected_task: Route through OCR before any chess interpretation.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route opening text
tasks.query: User asks for the opening idea after 1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.Nc3 dxe4 and wants source-backed explanation.
tasks.prompt: User asks for the opening idea after 1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.Nc3 dxe4 and wants source-backed explanation.
tasks.expected_task: Attach opening text context instead of guessing theory.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route DWZ context
tasks.query: User asks for DWZ context for an opponent before building a chess training note.
tasks.prompt: User asks for DWZ context for an opponent before building a chess training note.
tasks.expected_task: Use the DWZ lookup path and do not invent rating data.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route FIDE context
tasks.query: User asks for a FIDE rating context and source citation before comparing chess strengths.
tasks.prompt: User asks for a FIDE rating context and source citation before comparing chess strengths.
tasks.expected_task: Use the FIDE lookup path and keep source intent.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route chess translation
tasks.query: User asks: translate this English chess analysis into German, preserve SAN notation and FEN unchanged, no engine analysis.
tasks.prompt: User asks: translate this English chess analysis into German, preserve SAN notation and FEN unchanged, no engine analysis.
tasks.expected_task: Choose translator and avoid unnecessary tools.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Route profile import
tasks.query: User wants to import approved games for a chess profile and then generate weighted training positions.
tasks.prompt: User wants to import approved games for a chess profile and then generate weighted training positions.
tasks.expected_task: Plan the import and personalized-training tool path.
tasks.quality_question: Ist die Antwort schachlich korrekt, knapp und für CaiLama weiterverarbeitbar?

tasks.label: Local B18 key position
tasks.query:
Return JSON only: an array of objects with move, tags, quality_band, and short_reason. quality_band must be one of: loosing-blunder, blunder, mistake, ungenau, okay, good, stark, brilliant.
FEN: rn1qkb1r/pp3ppp/2p1pnb1/4N3/3P4/6N1/PPP2PPP/R1BQKB1R w KQkq - 0 8
Candidate moves: Nxf7, Nd7, Nxg6, Nxc6
Task: Local B18 key position: classify candidate moves including checks, captures, and development consequences.

Task: Local B18 key position: classify candidate moves including checks, captures, and development consequences.
tasks.expected_task: Classify every listed chess move with tags and CaiLama quality_band.
tasks.quality_question: Sind Tags, Mehrfachlabels und Qualitätsband schachlich plausibel?

tasks.label: Chess translation with glossary
